scripts.lint: uv run stylebook .github/ pnpm-workspace.yaml *.toml && pnpm exec stylebook *.json *.md
scripts.coverage: uv run coverage combine rulebook-cppcheck/.coverage rulebook-pylint/.coverage && uv run coverage xml
scripts.documentation: ./gradlew dokkaGenerateHtml && uv run pdoc -o build/pdoc/ rulebook-pylint/rulebook_pylint/ rulebook-cppcheck/rulebook_cppcheck/ && typedoc --entryPointStrategy packages --out build/typedoc/ rulebook-eslint/ rulebook-typescript-eslint/
scripts.prepublish-website: pnpm documentation && rm -rf website/docs/api/ && mkdir -p website/docs/api/ && mv build/dokka/html/ website/docs/api/javadoc/ && mv build/pdoc website/docs/api/pydoc/ && mv build/typedoc website/docs/api/tsdoc/
scripts.publish-website: scripts/prepare_mkdocs.sh && cd website && uv run mkdocs gh-deploy
scripts.preview-website: scripts/prepare_mkdocs.sh && cd website && uv run mkdocs serve --livereload
